results.rendered_html:
capalā
1 Lightning; kurabakakusumaṃ capalāmuṣamaṃ ratipatimṛgakānane  Gīt. 7. 
2 An unchaste or disloyal wife.
3 Spirituous liquor.
4 Lakṣmī, the goddess of wealth.
5 The tongue.
6 Long pepper.
Comp.
— janaḥ
1 a fickle or unsteady woman;  Śi. 9. 16. 
2 the goddess of wealth.
